case_title: ANDREW SCHENCK VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTAION AGENCY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-27-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTAION AGENCY

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTAION AGENCY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $111.00 FILED BY SCHENCK, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTAION AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOCELYN PEREZ--CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHENCK, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTAION AGENCY $83.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $128.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
